gross_margin.name: Gross Margin
gross_margin.description: Percentage of revenue remaining after cost of goods sold

operating_margin.name: Operating Margin
operating_margin.description: Percentage of revenue remaining after all operating expenses

net_profit_margin.name: Net Profit Margin
net_profit_margin.description: Percentage of revenue that becomes net income after all expenses and taxes

current_ratio.name: Current Ratio
current_ratio.description: Ability to pay short-term obligations; current assets divided by current liabilities

rd_growth.name: R&D Expense YoY Growth
rd_growth.description: Year-over-year percentage change in research and development expenses
